title: Reluxium Craft
description: Reluxium Craft 1.20.1 is a version of Reluxium craft 1.12.2 found on curse forge. its a survival modpack for The Reluxium craft Server. It has new generation, and Herobrine may be watching
body:
ReluxiumCraft [1.20.1] – A Survival Modpack For The Reluxium Craft Server Or Singleplayer Use

ReluxiumCraft is a carefully balanced modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 focused on enhancing survival and exploration without straying too far from vanilla gameplay. With revamped world generation and a selection of gameplay-changing mods, this pack offers a fresh experience while keeping things grounded.

Core Features:

New terrain generation for a more immersive and varied world

First Aid mod that overhauls health and healing mechanics

Backpack support for expanded inventory management

Web Displays mod for in-game browsing and interactive screens

Herobrine mod that adds mysterious and unsettling encounters to your world

ReluxiumCraft is perfect for players who enjoy classic survival gameplay with a few extra layers of depth, challenge, and mystery.
